title: Thai Chicken Wrap
description: A moist and flaky Thai wrap filled with spicy chicken and fresh herbs, perfect for a quick and satisfying meal.
instructions: Soak the rice paper wrappers in warm water for 10-15 minutes.
In a blender or food processor, combine the curry paste, fish sauce, lime juice, soy sauce, brown sugar, and rice vinegar. Blend until smooth.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of coconut oil over medium-high heat. Add the chicken and cook until browned and cooked through.
Add the blended curry sauce to the skillet and stir to coat the chicken.
To assemble the wraps, place a cooked chicken breast on a rice paper wrapper, followed by a spoonful of the curry sauce, some chopped cilantro and mint leaves, and a squeeze of lime juice.
Add a few sliced Thai basil leaves and a sprinkle of sriracha sauce if desired.
Fold the bottom half of the wrapper up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the wrapper to form a tight cylinder.
Repeat with the remaining ingredients to make 4-6 wraps.
